meaning: adj.极低的,猛的,可拆开的n.价格的压低,船的破损
examples: We just had our first knockdown about an hour ago.
Heaven's Fury: This ability will now respect knockdown immunity.
If was the last one they had and they sold it me at a knockdown price.
But he needed a knockdown Tuesday night to help change the narrative of the campaign.
"I was surprised he got up from the first knockdown because I hit him so hard, " Fortuna said.
